title: Surface-mount soldering & PCB repair (small boards)
description: Micro-soldering, component replacement, BGA rework (where feasible). 5+ years experience with consumer and industrial PCBs.

title: Washing machine diagnostics & repair
description: Fault codes, pump & heater replacement, drum/shaft repair, water inlet and electronic control fixes. Parts quoted separately.

title: Laptop motherboard repair — diagnostics + component level
description: Power rails, damaged connectors, short diagnosis. I repair DC jack, blown MOSFETs, burnt traces and do BGA reballing referrals.

title: Mobile phone screen replacement (all makes)
description: Original and high-quality aftermarket screens; installation and calibration. Data-safe service — backup recommended before service.

title: Home electrical — small jobs, sockets, switches, lighting
description: Safe, certified wiring repairs, new socket installs, LED lighting installation and troubleshooting. I follow local electrical codes.

title: TV repair — no power / backlight issues
description: LED/LCD TV diagnostics, backlight replacement, PSU repair, HDMI port fixes.

title: Custom PC build & upgrades
description: Gaming and workstation PC builds, cable management, cooling optimization.

title: Router setup & WiFi optimization
description: Full home network setup, mesh systems, signal improvement and troubleshooting.

title: Fridge repair & cooling issues
description: Compressor diagnostics, thermostat replacement, gas refill coordination.

title: Smart home installation (lights, sensors)
description: Setup of smart switches, sensors, hubs and automation routines.

title: Drone repair & calibration
description: Motor replacement, ESC repair, firmware flashing and calibration.

title: Car electronics diagnostics
description: OBD diagnostics, sensor issues, wiring faults troubleshooting.

title: Battery replacement (laptops & tools)
description: Safe battery swaps and compatibility checks for laptops and power tools.

title: 3D printing service (PLA/ABS)
description: Custom parts, prototypes, small batch printing with design assistance.

title: CCTV installation & setup
description: Camera installation, DVR/NVR setup, remote access configuration.

title: Microwave oven repair
description: Magnetron, capacitor, fuse and control board diagnostics.

title: Audio amplifier repair
description: Hi-fi amplifier diagnostics, capacitor replacement, noise troubleshooting.

title: Laptop screen replacement
description: Screen swaps for most brands, dead pixel and backlight issues.

title: Electric stove repair
description: Heating element replacement, thermostat and wiring fixes.

title: Basic handyman electrical fixes
description: Quick fixes: switches, lamps, minor wiring issues.

title: Phone battery replacement
description: Fast battery swaps for most smartphone brands.

title: PSU repair (desktop computers)
description: Power supply diagnostics and component replacement.

description: Indoor/outdoor LED strips, power supplies and controllers setup.

description: From idea to working prototype: PCB design, assembly and testing.
